title: Add GET /api/settings + POST /api/settings/validate endpoints
implementation_notes: Create app/server/api/settings.get.ts — returns { vaultRoot: string|null, resolvedRoot: string, isValid: boolean, invalidReason: string|null }.
vaultRoot = process.env.RELAYHQ_VAULT_ROOT (raw env value, null if unset).
isValid = true only when resolvedRoot/vault/shared/ is accessible via fs.access.
Create app/server/api/settings/validate.post.ts — body: { path: string }, returns { valid: boolean, path: string, reason?: string }.
validate endpoint checks only — does not write anything.

Update settings.post.ts: validate vault/shared/ exists before writing .env; also set process.env.RELAYHQ_VAULT_ROOT = root so the change takes effect immediately without server restart; return 422 if invalid.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/settings returns correct vaultRoot, resolvedRoot, isValid for both configured and unconfigured states.
POST /api/settings/validate returns valid:true for a real vault root and valid:false with a reason for a bad path.
POST /api/settings rejects invalid paths with 422 before writing anything.
After a successful POST /api/settings, subsequent GET /api/vault/read-model uses the new vault root without restart.
All three endpoints are covered by unit tests.
completion_summary: Added settings GET/validate APIs with vault-root validation and tests
